title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
